author: Victor Olabodé M.
pros: Genie AI is user friendly. It is open source. It provides fantastic templates which I can adapt to clients needs in a bespoke manner. It comes highly recommended.
cons: Not applicable thus far. Will make suggestions as I go on and find any challenges.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The document one stop shop that solves so many worries
description: As a bootstrapped start up, getting quick and easy guidance to policy document creation is a fantastic boost. The experience has been superb so far, I would have wasted a lot of time without it.
author: Alexander L.
pros: Just having all of these documents under one roof is super helpful. This is the first place to look when building out the policy infrastructure of my start up. The variety of documents is great and an indication of what is commonly used gives me confidence of what I should be using to. I like how easy it is to access and download documents. In the future I will consider sharing functions too.
cons: It is early in the development of this product, but I look forward to when I can be better guided to the template/document that I need. I am told what is popular but I am not guided on why. It would be great to have a guide on what to have 3/6/12 months into a start up or when certain milestones are met. Perhaps document collections for a particular business model. Also, I would like to have everything standardised to a common style and typeface.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Genie AI has been one of the AI platforms that our business has used to improve work efficiency in different aspects. It has been used for team collaboration and drafting documents.
author: Mark H.
pros: It is a platform that can give the information to make work more efficiently completed. It is helpful in drafting in-depth information for companies.
cons: Genie AI has a less personalized feel with its responses compared to other AI features. Genie AI lacks regarding creative requests at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good software for simple legal documents
description: I liked that it set out the document to start with, I could then review and amend as I saw fit for my specific purposes. As a non-lawyer t makes it much easier than starting with a blank page. Overall the experience was good, I found it good value (low cost) and better for small legal documents than going through engaging and speaking to a lawyer.
author: Matt W.
pros: The big one for me is document creation. I am capable of reviewing most documents, but creating them from scratch, in the correct form and using the correct language is more difficult.
cons: Initially, the software does not always have the type of document that I am seeking. They do always go away and try to find a suitable document though. This can take a few days though, so sometimes I have had to source it elsewhere by then if it urgent.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Genie is my go to legal document repo
author: Charis S.
pros: Document management and vast library of templates
cons: UI needs a bit of refinement still, but it's getting there
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A fun tool but very Left Wing Biased
description: Great for small document creation and searches.
author: Robert T.
pros: Great for research and basic information search.
cons: It is programmed to flat-out lie and will always stick to leftwing propaganda and viewpoints. Disappointing that this is the case.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: For non-legal experts, it's a win
description: ease of use high, saves me a lot of time, enough content to keep going and log back in!
author: sophia P.
pros: easiest editing software, has saved us a ton of money.
cons: some documents that we need aren't available yet!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Managing the processes within the business
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the use of the software as it allow me to manage processes across the business
cons: Customising the software took its time but overall quite happy
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tom S.
pros: Free document templates, with categorisation of which industries use it, as well as which law it correlates to.
cons: The search function can show many similar and/or same results, which can be confusing for users. I think a much simpler ranking should be used for documents.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Useful Styles at a Very Reasonable Cost
description: Very pleased with the additions to my styles collection.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Detailed and accurate style documents which allow me to create required deeds.
cons: Haven't found anything particularly troublesome yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: When the document I am looking for is there it's okay
author: John Q.
pros: It has a database of common documents and the precedents are okay
cons: It is just a database of common documents
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Very good. Will use in the future.
author: Stuart H.
pros: At last there is a go to open source platform for legal documents and contracts. Open and transparent, no gimmicks. I have recommended to colleagues.
cons: No issues for me at all. Great service and platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Alanbek Y.
pros: Good range of contract templates and decent quality of the content.
cons: The formatting of the Word version of the documents could have been done better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Brilliant. Support for document changes was very quick and effective.
author: Christopher B.
pros: Quick and easy way to get started with your B2B legal documents.
cons: Nothing. I have found using Genie AI to be great
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Ease of use, confidence in results.
author: Tony H.
pros: It was very intuitive and friendly. It address all my concerns and question in a quick and easy manner. Much better than employing a legal professional.
cons: Nothing to dislike. Great software and a doddle to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Anna S.
pros: Easy to use and helped me with contract drafting
cons: There is nothing i can say to criticize the software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great! Allowed me to save money on expensive contracts & save time on creation.
author: Oliver M.
pros: Accessing a reliable, well-written, in-depth bank of contracts is extremely useful for any early-stage startup. Genie's range is extensive and trustworthy
cons: Only tiny issue I had was exporting docs to Google Sheets (some formatting issues).
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Good product. Easy to use. Great range of agreements.
description: Very positive experience overall - so far!
author: Philip A.
pros: Good product. Easy to use. Great range of agreements. Integrates well into our current operations.
cons: Very little to say here. Range of template documents keeps expanding, which I like.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Saves a fortune on solicitors' bills to draft contracts!
author: Andy S.
pros: The system is easy to use and has a broad range of legal material which seems to be of a very high standard, certainly comparable to the other offerings we've evaluated but without the expense.
cons: I'd like to see more customisability or alternative content. The Software development agreement for instance is only written for Agile development and the project I needed it for was Waterfall-based.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: So easy to jump in, and a comprehensive set of features once I did!
description: Lovely design and ease of use.
author: Jack B.
pros: I found it super easy to get started, and I can see how this is going to help me manage all my legal docs going forward. I'll look to get everything in here.
cons: I was looking for a bulk upload feature, hopefully I'll find that next time I'm logged in.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Finding template agreements for my business is always a struggle. I am not necessarily trying to circumvent legal professionals but trying to think of the sort of thinks that are necessary to make a particular type of agreement work. This in turn helps me in the negotiation process.
author: Michael F.
pros: The best thing about the platform is the free templates. They are very well written.
cons: Unfortunately, the search functionality is in its infancy.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Highly recommended - if you know what exactly you are looking for
description: All in all our overall experience with Genie AI has been great with exceptionally good customer service so far. We really hope that this would go on to become an essential tool for every business environment.
author: Pradeep M.
pros: It has to be the sheer amount of documents available on the platform, to suit various scenarios.
cons: It can be a bit time consuming to locate what you are looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Gejia O.
pros: easy to find templates and make changes.
cons: not very easy to find the right fit and compare the available options
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quick and Easy to use and great range of forms
description: Overall, happy with what I used on the website to find the exact documents needed.
author: Jason W.
pros: Easy to use and understand with a good search engine to find the documents you need.
cons: Having to sign up and not have the option to use as a guest.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helped me to save time and money, which as a small business owner is what I need!
author: Amy B.
pros: Really easy to use - searching and finding relevant docs is super quick. PLUS they emailed me with most used docs for my professions, which was really useful.
cons: Honestly, nothing so far! I have only used it very briefly though.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
